title: Charms.
content:
Bring the holy crust of bread,
    Lay it underneath the head;
    'Tis a certain charm to keep
    Hags away, while children sleep.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Charms.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
